2026/05/20 23:17:10.733645280 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733645931 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733657087 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733657718 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733668685 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733669296 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733679421 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733679992 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733690888 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733691499 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733703998 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733722109 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733729246 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733729837 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733741644 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733754193 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733766772 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733767363 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733778840 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733779531 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733814123 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733814724 "default"))
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733827974 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733846832 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733865921 }
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733866612 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733878790 if (!missing(family)) {

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733915345 }

2026/05/20 23:17:10.733968079 old$family <- family
2026/05/20 23:17:10.733981870 }

2026/05/20 23:17:11.839050569 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/20 23:17:11.839061806 }

2026/05/20 23:17:11.839073043 }
